prompt: hey can you make storybook docs for our spacing and sizing tokens? the css is in bs-storybook-docs-workspace/evals/files/tokens/scale.css. should show the full scale visually with measured blocks, and group them by the gestalt tiers (tight/medium/loose). radii too please
assertions: File uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta (no component type parameter)
Tags include 'autodocs' and parameters include layout: 'fullscreen'
All spacing tokens present from --size-0 through --size-128
Gestalt tier grouping: tight (4-8), medium (12-20), loose (28-32+)
Both pixel and rem values shown for spacing tokens
Uses DocPage, Section, SectionHeading from stories/helpers/
Uses TokenTable or DemoBox for visual rendering
Zero inline style attributes — all visual via helpers
